message:
🌱 Add flowise: [BUG] REST API upsert new document - all the time a new mission (#987)

files.patch: @@ -0,0 +1,76 @@ +{ + "version": "kc-mission-v1", + "name": "flowise-4661-bug-rest-api-upsert-new-document-all-the-time-a-new-document-store-", + "missionClass": "solution", + "author": "KubeStellar Bot", + "authorGithub": "kubestellar", + "mission": { + "title": "flowise: [BUG] REST API upsert new document - all the time a new document store is created", + "description": "[BUG] REST API upsert new document - all the time a new document store is created. Community-reported issue.", + "type": "troubleshoot", + "status": "completed", + "steps": [ + { + "title": "Identify flowise troubleshoot symptoms", + "description": "Check for the issue in your flowise deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n flowise -l app.kubernetes.io/name=flowise\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=flowise -n flowise --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue." + }, + { + "title": "Review flowise configuration", + "description": "Inspect the relevant flowise configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n flowise -l app.kubernetes.io/name=flowise\nkubectl get configmap -n flowise -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=flowise\n```\nI'm using the python code present in \nhttps://docs.flowiseai.com/using-flowise/document-stores#id-10.-api\nWant to reproduce: \n**Scenario 1: In the same document store, use an existing document loader configuration, upsert as new document" + }, + { + "title": "Apply the fix for [BUG] REST API upsert new document - all the time a new…", + "description": "Hi and ,\n\nPlease follow step by step guide:\n1. POST `{{current_url}}/api/v1/document-store/store`\n```json\n{\n \"name\": \"Create from API\",\n \"description\": \"Create from API\"\n}\n```\nThis will create Document Store, remember to record down the `id`, as shown in screenshots:\n=1.24", + "tools": [ + "kubectl" + ], + "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with flowise installed or the issue environment reproducible." + }, + "security": { + "scannedAt": "2026-03-13T06:47:54.116Z", + "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0", + "sanitized": true, + "findings": [] + } +}
